nodes.name: Interest and payable for 1M Above(40% interest)

parameters.content:
JOB TITLE: N8N AUTOMATION SPECIALIST NEEDED TO BUILD LOAN ELIGIBILITY & EMAIL APPROVAL WORKFLOW

JOB OVERVIEW
We are looking for an experienced n8n automation specialist to design and optimize a workflow that manages loan eligibility verification, automated email communication, and response-based follow-ups. The system should operate as a semi-automated loan approval funnel, handling applicants from form submission through confirmation and reminders.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

PROJECT DESCRIPTION
Applicants complete an online form to check loan eligibility. Based on predefined criteria, eligible users receive a structured loan offer via email with approval/decline options. If no response is received within a defined timeframe, the system automatically sends reminder emails and continues the workflow logic accordingly.

The goal is to create a reliable, production-ready automation that minimizes manual intervention while maintaining clear communication with prospects.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

CORE RESPONSIBILITIES
- Build and refine workflows inside n8n
- Implement eligibility logic based on submitted form data
- Each Applicant gets a welcome email acknowledging their interest
- Perform automated calculations (interest rate & total payable)
- Implement timeout logic and automated reminder emails
- Handle branching logic for:
- Approved responses
- Declined responses
- No-response follow-ups
- Store applicant data in Google Sheets (CRM-style tracking)
- Ensure clean data handling and scalable workflow structure

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

TECH STACK
- n8n (primary automation platform)
- Gmail API
- Google Sheets integration

DELIVERABLES
- Fully functional end-to-end workflow
- Cleanly structured and documented automation
- Error-safe logic handling responses and timeouts
- Mobile-friendly HTML email templates
- Scalable workflow design ready for future expansion

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

IDEAL CANDIDATE
- Strong experience with n8n workflows
- Comfortable with conditional logic and execution states
- Experience building approval or onboarding automations
- Familiar with email automation best practices
- Able to design maintainable, production-level workflows

NICE TO HAVE
- Experience with fintech or lead qualification funnels
- Knowledge of CRM-style automation design
- Optimization for response/conversion workflows

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

PROJECT TYPE: One-time setup (with potential long-term collaboration)
EXPERIENCE LEVEL: Intermediate to Expert
AVAILABILITY: Start immediately

Please include examples of similar automation workflows you have built when applying.

Dear {{ $('Store CRM Data').item.json.Name }},

We are thrilled to inform you that your loan application has been approved by Blue Horizon Finance! 🎉 Your trust in us means the world, and we are committed to making your borrowing experience seamless and transparent.

Approved Loan Amount{{ $('Store CRM Data').item.json['Loan Amount'] }}
